Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Acquisition by Siam Delta Holdings Public Company Limited (RET: SDH)
Parties: Buyer — Siam Delta Holdings PCL (Thai listed company); Seller — Nakhon Sky Logistics Co., Ltd.; both incorporated in Thailand.
Transaction: Acquisition of a controlling stake in Nakhon Sky Logistics through a mix of share purchase and primary subscription.
Consideration: Combination of newly issued SDH shares listed on the River Exchange of Thailand (RET) and cash; pricing methodology to follow OCMAT disclosure templates.
Regulatory: Subject to Office of Capital Markets Administration of Thailand (OCMAT) notifications and RET free-float/major transaction rules; public enquiries may contact RET Helpdesk 02-000-0000.
Conditions Precedent: Approval by SDH shareholders at EGM, OCMAT clearance, merger control and foreign business permission; absence of material adverse change.
Disclosure: This summary reflects public and already-announced parameters only and excludes undisclosed MNPI; any inside information will be handled under the issuer’s PDPA-compliant controls.
Employment & PDPA: Employees of Nakhon Sky Logistics to be retained; personal data processed for contractual and legal purposes; sample form fields: Name: _______; Citizen ID: 1-2345-67890-12-3; Department: _______.
Financing: Senior term facility to be arranged with a Thai financial institution; escrow account: [to be designated]; no bank account or SWIFT details are exchanged in this term sheet.
Governance: Post-closing board composition to include Independent Director, CFO, and Company Secretary (role-only identifiers; formal names to be proposed in the circular).
Covenants: Conduct of business in the ordinary course; no dividend outside existing published policy; no related-party transactions except as disclosed to the market.
KYC & Signing: Authorized Signatory (Thai passport UZ1234567) to appear for verification at closing; certified copies to be provided to the notary and registrar.
Timetable: Signing and completion targeted within standard OCMAT review cycles; long-stop date aligned to regulatory clearance windows.
Notices: Use role mailbox for communications — investor.relations@siamdelta.example; physical addresses and direct personal numbers are intentionally omitted in this draft.
